site.title: Tovaitech — AI products for everyday services

hero.title: Practical AI for everyday services
hero.subtitle: Tovaitech builds focused, India-first products — starting with clinic appointments, and growing into education and more. English-always, Malayalam where it matters.

products.title: Appointments & Queue
products.body: WhatsApp + voice booking for clinics, a live token queue, walk-ins and emergencies, and a self-serve admin. Malayalam-first.
products.note: Patients: open the link your clinic shared, e.g. /appointments/your-clinic

products.title: Education & Exam Prep
products.body: Guided learning, practice exams and AI tutoring — adaptive, multilingual, and affordable.

products.title: Customer Assist
products.body: WhatsApp + voice assistants that answer, qualify and route — in the customer's own language.

products.title: More on the way
products.body: We add one focused product at a time. Have an idea or a partnership in mind? Reach out.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how Tovaitech ("we", "us") collects, uses, shares and protects personal information when you use our products and services, including our clinic appointment and queue product that operates over WhatsApp and voice.

sections.heading: Who we are
sections.body: Tovaitech is based in Kerala, India, and builds AI products for everyday services. For any privacy question or request, contact us at contact@tovaitech.in.

sections.heading: Information we collect
sections.body: Depending on how you use our services, we may collect: your name and phone number; your WhatsApp profile name and messages you send to our booking number; appointment details such as the clinic, doctor, date, time and token you request; voice recordings or transcripts when you book by voice; and basic technical data such as device type and timestamps needed to deliver the service.

sections.heading: How we use your information
sections.body: We use your information to create and manage your appointments, send you booking confirmations and queue updates, operate and improve our services, prevent abuse, and comply with legal obligations. We do not sell your personal information.

sections.heading: WhatsApp and Meta platforms
sections.body: Our booking service uses the WhatsApp Business Platform provided by Meta. When you message us on WhatsApp, your messages are processed in accordance with this policy and with WhatsApp's and Meta's own terms and privacy policies. We only use the WhatsApp Business APIs to provide the booking and queue service you requested.

sections.heading: Sharing your information
sections.body: We share appointment details with the specific clinic you are booking with so they can serve you. We may share information with service providers who help us run our infrastructure (such as hosting and messaging providers like Meta), strictly to deliver the service, and with authorities where required by law. We require these providers to protect your data.

sections.heading: Data retention
sections.body: We keep your information only as long as needed to provide the service and meet legal, accounting or reporting requirements. You can ask us to delete your data at any time — see our Data Deletion instructions.

sections.heading: Your rights
sections.body: You may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data, and you may withdraw consent for messaging at any time. To exercise any of these rights, contact us at contact@tovaitech.in or follow our Data Deletion instructions.

sections.heading: Security
sections.body: We use reasonable technical and organisational measures to protect your information against unauthorised access, loss or misuse. No method of transmission or storage is completely secure, but we work to safeguard your data.

sections.heading: Children
sections.body: Our services are intended for adults booking on their own or their dependants' behalf. We do not knowingly collect data directly from children without a responsible adult.

sections.heading: Changes to this policy
sections.body: We may update this policy from time to time. The latest version will always be available on this page with its effective date.

sections.heading: Contact us
sections.body: For any privacy question or to exercise your rights, email contact@tovaitech.in.

dataDeletion.title: User Data Deletion
dataDeletion.intro: You can ask us to delete the personal data we hold about you at any time. This page gives you clear, explicit instructions for requesting deletion of your data from Tovaitech's services, including data collected through our WhatsApp booking service.
emailSteps: Use the subject line: "Data deletion request".
In the message, include the phone number you used to book (so we can locate your records) and, if you wish, the clinic name and approximate appointment dates.
We will verify the request and delete your personal data, then email you a confirmation.
whatsappSteps: Open the WhatsApp chat with the booking number your clinic shared with you.
Follow the prompt to confirm your request.
We will delete your personal data and reply with a confirmation.
dataDeletion.timeline: We process verified deletion requests within 30 days. Some information may be retained for a limited period where the law requires it (for example, records needed for tax or audit). Once a request is completed, your personal data is removed from our active systems.
dataDeletion.contactNote: If you have any trouble with either option, email contact@tovaitech.in and we will help you complete your request.
